message:
fix(cli/mail): harden display sanitization and add action-aware mark filtering

- Replace bare StripANSI calls with sanitizeMailDisplayField() which
  additionally strips control characters (CR, LF, tab → space; other
  controls removed) and collapses whitespace runs, preventing escape
  sequence injection in terminal output for subjects, senders, and
  recipients
- Add mailMessageMatchesAction() filter so "mark read" skips already-read
  messages and "mark ack" skips messages without ack_required, preventing
  unnecessary API calls and confusing no-op marks
- Tests cover sanitization of ANSI sequences, control characters, and
  the action-matching filter logic

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
